agents.name: Terraform_Expert
agents.description: This Agent is responsible for analyzing the JSON file containing the Terraform configuration and providing detailed inventory of resources, including their types and attributes.

agents.name: Security_Expert
agents.description: This Agent is responsible for analyzing the analysis generated by Terraform_Expert Agent for security measures and creating a report in markdown format. Has access to SCF (Secure Controls Framework) knowledge base via Azure AI Search for grounded security control references.

initial_message: I have uploaded a JSON file that contains a Terraform configuration. Terraform_Expert will analyze this file and provide a detailed inventory of resources, including their types and attributes. After that, Security_Expert will review the analysis and generate a comprehensive security assessment report in markdown format with a structured table containing all security findings with columns: Deficiency ID, Severity, Status, Current Date, Deficiency Type, OWASP/CWE Reference, SCF Reference, Owner, Affected Assets, Deficiency Title, Threat Description, and Proposed Mitigation. The report must be saved using the create_file function.
